description: Empid initially encountered at a distance of 15 feet or so in bright shade. Moderate green back and crown with gray wash on sides of nape. Auriculars olive washed in gray - dark. Contrasting with whitish throat. Underparts otherwise white excepting pale yellowish wash vent/undertail coverts and vague olive wash to sides of chest. Crown held flat. Otherwise shaped like a Traills but bill seemed a tad small. Longish primary extension. Very narrow but distinct whitish eyering. Circular and unbroken. High contrast between flight feathers and edges, similar to LEFL in this respect. Wingbars white. Tertial edges white. At one point came into pishing and uttered a "Peep" call twice while being watched
